previousDayImpact: The USA victory provided a massive boost to the majority of the field, with eight entries gaining 10 points each to keep the leaderboard tight.
Team Choo Choo and Team koyn created separation by benefiting from England and Belgium victories, respectively, in addition to the common USA points.
leaderboardSummary: Team Choo Choo surged 4 spots to reach a tie for 1st place after a strong 28-point performance.
Team koyn climbed 3 spots into 7th place, while Bijan Mustard saw the largest drop, falling 5 spots to 8th.
leverageWatch: Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz and Team Mack face off in the Austria vs. Spain match, creating a direct head-to-head leverage opportunity.
Team Jordan and Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz both hold interests in the Croatia vs. Portugal match, with the latter also relying on Portugal to gain ground.
